name: ETH Squeeze Hold Reversion v1
thesis: ETH 4h is the cleaner similar-asset lane for testing volatility squeeze resolution with hold logic, but in a chop-dominant environment the monetization should still be mean-reversion aware rather than pure breakout worship. The edge should come from broad compression-release participation with quicker asymmetric harvesting.
edge_mechanism: squeeze release with asymmetric hold/reversion exits
invalidation_condition: Abort if squeeze setups remain too sparse, if release bars immediately mean-revert before hold is visible, or if the asymmetric exit structure cannot overcome costs.

pre_submit_reasoning.market_behavior_targeted: Compression resolves into a short-lived directional release, and entry is taken only when price remains aligned with fast value rather than instantly reversing.
pre_submit_reasoning.why_edge_should_exist: Even in chop, some compression releases persist for a brief second leg. The management edge here is asymmetric harvesting rather than trying to ride a full trend that likely never arrives.
pre_submit_reasoning.asset_timeframe_fit: ETH 4h is the cleaner lane for testing this because squeeze and hold structure is more readable than on TAO while still offering meaningful range expansion.
pre_submit_reasoning.likely_failure_mode: If compression resolves straight back into mean reversion, the release will not persist long enough to justify even the front-half targets.
pre_submit_reasoning.first_refinement_path: If entries engage but the hold never extends, keep the entry and compress exits further rather than tightening setup conditions.

density_sanity_check.contradictory_filters: none obvious; squeeze and hold are sequential
density_sanity_check.event_sparsity: managed with moderate compression thresholds instead of extreme squeeze-only definitions

long: Exit remaining 20% on close back through EMA_55 or 4 bars
short: Exit remaining 20% on close back through EMA_55 or 4 bars
